requirement_topic.en: EMC Evidence for PV Inverters and Associated Communications
requirement_topic.zh: 光伏逆变器及相关通信功能的 EMC 证据
requirement_topic.zht: 光伏逆變器及相關通訊功能的 EMC 證據

summary.en: PV inverter projects commonly request EMC evidence covering conducted and radiated disturbance, immunity, and power-quality effects. CISPR 11 / IEC 61000-family reports are typical technical evidence for industrial, scientific, and medical equipment disturbance and immunity assessments. If the inverter includes Wi-Fi, cellular, Bluetooth, or other radio communications, separate Philippine radio or telecom equipment approval may also be relevant for the communication module.
summary.zh: 光伏逆变器项目通常要求 EMC 证据，覆盖传导和辐射骚扰、抗扰度以及电能质量影响。CISPR 11 / IEC 61000 系列报告是工业、科学和医疗设备骚扰及抗扰度评估的常见技术证据。如逆变器包含 Wi-Fi、蜂窝、蓝牙或其他无线通信，通信模块还可能涉及菲律宾无线电或电信设备批准。
summary.zht: 光伏逆變器專案通常要求 EMC 證據，覆蓋傳導和輻射騷擾、抗擾度以及電能品質影響。CISPR 11 / IEC 61000 系列報告是工業、科學和醫療設備騷擾及抗擾度評估的常見技術證據。如逆變器包含 Wi-Fi、蜂窩、藍牙或其他無線通訊，通訊模組還可能涉及菲律賓無線電或電信設備批准。

standards_or_laws: Philippine radio / telecom equipment approval where radio modules are included

summary.en: Chinese export files may include GB/T EMC reports, IEC 61000-family reports, or EU / UK / AU EMC reports. These can support Philippine review, but the report scope must match the exact inverter model, enclosure, cable configuration, communications module, firmware, and grid profile shipped to the Philippines.
summary.zh: 中国出口文件可能包括 GB/T EMC 报告、IEC 61000 系列报告或欧盟 / 英国 / 澳大利亚 EMC 报告。这些可支持菲律宾审查，但报告范围必须匹配出口菲律宾的确切逆变器型号、外壳、电缆配置、通信模块、固件和电网配置。
summary.zht: 中國出口文件可能包括 GB/T EMC 報告、IEC 61000 系列報告或歐盟 / 英國 / 澳大利亞 EMC 報告。這些可支持菲律賓審查，但報告範圍必須匹配出口菲律賓的確切逆變器型號、外殼、電纜配置、通訊模組、韌體和電網配置。

gap.en: The usual gap is model and configuration coverage. Confirm whether the EMC report includes the same power rating, enclosure, cable lengths, communications accessories, filters, firmware, and installation mode. For radio modules, check whether the module already has Philippine approval or whether the importer must handle local radio documentation.
gap.zh: 常见差距是型号和配置覆盖。应确认 EMC 报告是否包含相同功率等级、外壳、电缆长度、通信附件、滤波器、固件和安装方式。对于无线模块，应核查模块是否已有菲律宾批准，或进口商是否必须处理当地无线电文件。
gap.zht: 常見差距是型號和配置覆蓋。應確認 EMC 報告是否包含相同功率等級、外殼、電纜長度、通訊附件、濾波器、韌體和安裝方式。對於無線模組，應核查模組是否已有菲律賓批准，或進口商是否必須處理當地無線電文件。

mandatory_status.target: Usually project, buyer, utility, or module-specific unless a cited Philippine instrument makes the exact product or radio module mandatory; radio communications may trigger separate mandatory approval
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary, export-supporting, or mandatory only where a specific Chinese EMC or radio rule applies

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC evidence should be treated as configuration-specific. A generic China or EU EMC report may help, but Philippine project review needs reports that match the actual shipped inverter and any radio communications module.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] EMC 证据应按配置具体判断。通用中国或欧盟 EMC 报告可能有帮助，但菲律宾项目审查需要与实际出货逆变器及任何无线通信模块匹配的报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] EMC 證據應按配置具體判斷。通用中國或歐盟 EMC 報告可能有幫助，但菲律賓專案審查需要與實際出貨逆變器及任何無線通訊模組匹配的報告。
